row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward motion along a curved road with slight rightward drift.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Blue bus moving left to right across the intersection; white car and truck moving forward in adjacent lanes.

semantic.scene_summary: Urban driving scene showing an intersection with multiple lanes, traffic lights, and surrounding greenery. A blue bus is crossing the intersection from left to right. White vehicles are visible ahead.
semantic.visibility_notes: All key objects are clearly visible with natural lighting and sharp detail. No occlusions obscure critical elements.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Motion appears smooth and continuous. The bus moves steadily across the frame without abrupt jumps or distortions.
logical.object_continuity: Vehicles maintain consistent size and position relative to perspective changes. Pedestrians remain stable in location until exiting frame naturally.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry, lane markings, and background structures remain fixed and coherent throughout the sequence.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle proceeds forward at moderate speed, approaching the intersection while maintaining lane discipline.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazard detected. Traffic flow is orderly; no sudden stops or evasive maneuvers required.

semantic.scene_summary: AI-generated version of the same urban driving scene. Features similar layout but with noticeable degradation in object clarity and texture fidelity.
semantic.visibility_notes: Objects appear smeared or partially missing. Textures lack realism. Some elements (e.g., pedestrians) are barely discernible.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Movement shows minor jitter and inconsistent scaling. Bus trajectory has slight wobble compared to reference.
logical.object_continuity: Some objects flicker or vanish briefly during transitions. Pedestrian positions shift unnaturally between frames.
logical.structure_continuity: Road boundaries show subtle warping. Lane lines occasionally break or merge incorrectly due to generation artifacts.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward similarly to Row 1, though path alignment appears slightly less precise.
decision.risk_context: Reduced scene readability may impair downstream decision-making. No overt collision risk visible, but ambiguity increases uncertainty.

artifacts_or_instabilities: loss of fine structural detail in signs/poles
